prompt: Apply the UI mockup elements on the computer screen.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Display the user interface (UI) design from image 2 onto the blank screen of the computer monitor in image 1. Arrange the three mobile UI screens from image 2 clearly on the desktop display, as a unified multi-pane desktop application or related windows, maintaining their original style and content.
objects: second mobile UI screen (Product details with pink chair)
desktop application window elements (framing the UI screens)
